head.b:skin: *{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:#0d1117;color:#e6edf3;font:normal 400 16px 'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;line-height:1.65}a{color:#22d3ee;text-decoration:none}a:hover{text-decoration:underline}img{max-width:100%;height:auto}h1,h2,h3,h4{font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;color:#e6edf3;line-height:1.25}.ti-wrap{max-width:1140px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 20px}.ti-main-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 320px;gap:40px;padding:40px 0;align-items:start}@media(max-width:900px){.ti-main-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.ti-header{background:#0b2038;border-bottom:2px solid #22d3ee;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50}.ti-header-inner{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:14px 0;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap}.ti-brand-title{margin:0;font-size:22px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center}.ti-brand-title a{color:#e6edf3;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}.ti-logo{height:60px;width:auto;display:inline-block;border-radius:6px}.ti-tagline{margin:6px 0 0;font-size:13px;color:#8b949e}.header .description,.Header .description,.descriptionwrapper{display:none!important}.header .widget{display:block!important}.ti-nav ul{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:10px;margin:0;padding:0;flex-wrap:wrap}.ti-nav li{margin:0}.ti-nav a{color:#e6edf3;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;padding:8px 16px;border:1px solid #30363d;border-radius:8px;background:#0d1117;transition:all .15s ease}.ti-nav a:hover{color:#0d1117;background:#22d3ee;border-color:#22d3ee;text-decoration:none}.blog-posts{margin:0}.ti-post{background:#161b22;border:1px solid #30363d;border-radius:14px;padding:26px 28px;margin-bottom:24px}.ti-post-flex{display:flex;gap:18px;align-items:flex-start}@media(max-width:560px){.ti-post-flex{flex-direction:column}}.ti-post-thumb-sm{width:150px;height:100px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:8px;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid #30363d}.ti-post-label{display:inline-block;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',Consolas,monospace;font-size:12px;color:#22d3ee;background:rgba(34,211,238,0.12);padding:2px 9px;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:8px}.ti-post-title{margin:4px 0 8px;font-size:25px;font-weight:800}.ti-post-title a{color:#e6edf3}.ti-post-title a:hover{color:#22d3ee;text-decoration:none}.ti-post-meta{color:#8b949e;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:14px}.ti-post-body{color:#e6edf3}.ti-readmore{display:inline-block;margin-top:12px;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;color:#22d3ee}.ti-pager{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 0 30px}.ti-pager a{display:inline-block;padding:9px 18px;border:1px solid #30363d;border-radius:8px;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;background:#161b22;color:#22d3ee}.sidebar .widget{background:#161b22;border:1px solid #30363d;border-radius:14px;padding:20px 22px;margin-bottom:22px}.sidebar .widget h2{font-size:13px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;color:#8b949e;margin:0 0 14px;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid #30363d;font-weight:700}.sidebar .widget ul{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0}.sidebar .widget li{padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #30363d;font-size:15px}.sidebar .widget li:last-child{border-bottom:0}.sidebar .widget a{color:#22d3ee}.ti-footer{background:#010409;color:#8b949e;margin-top:40px;border-top:1px solid #30363d;text-align:center;padding:28px 20px;font-size:13px}.ti-footer a{color:#22d3ee}
